reference: I am experiencing severe back pain just below my ribs in the kidney area, as if a one-inch poker is being pushed through my back. The pain is not easing with tramadol or solpadol and is increasing constantly. Using a hot water bottle is making it even worse. I don't know what to do with myself. This is a recurring flare-up that happens once a year for the past three years. I have been admitted to the hospital before and have had numerous tests, including cameras and scans down my throat, an MRI, and X-rays. It first started when I was in the Dominican Republic. Please help.
